primary_variables.matched_definition: Elevated temperature exposure (acute or chronic) relative to baseline culture conditions.
evidence: For heat shock treatment, cell culture media was replaced with fresh media pre-warmed to 42°C and placed at 42°C for the indicated time.
we performed proteomic analysis following tandem ubiquitin binding entity (TUBE)-based capture of the ubiquitinome in HEK293T cells exposed to heat stress (42°C)

primary_variables.matched_definition: Intervention using a compound that inhibits a target protein, pathway, or process.
evidence: multiplexed tandem mass tagging (TMT) MS quantification of the whole proteome from unstressed, heat-stressed, or arsenite-stressed cells in the presence or absence of proteasome inhibition (0.5 μM bortezomib)
When indicated, 1 μM TAK243 was added directly to cell culture media 30 min prior to stress treatment

primary_variables.matched_definition: Redox perturbation caused by pro-oxidant treatment (for example H2O2 exposure).
evidence: For other stresses, media was replaced with fresh media containing 0.5 mM sodium arsenite
we performed proteomic analysis following tandem ubiquitin binding entity (TUBE)-based capture of the ubiquitinome in HEK293T cells exposed to... oxidative stress (sodium arsenite)

primary_variables.matched_definition: Stress from salt changes or osmolyte-driven osmolarity changes.
evidence: For other stresses, media was replaced with fresh media containing... 0.4 M sorbitol
we performed proteomic analysis following tandem ubiquitin binding entity (TUBE)-based capture of the ubiquitinome in HEK293T cells exposed to... osmotic stress (sorbitol)

primary_variables.matched_definition: Exposure to UV or intense light causing photodamage or photostress.
evidence: For UV stress, media was removed and replaced with 2 ml PBS and 40 J/m2 UV radiation was delivered.
we performed proteomic analysis following tandem ubiquitin binding entity (TUBE)-based capture of the ubiquitinome in HEK293T cells exposed to... UV stress

remained at a constant elevated level during prolonged stress for at least 150 min
media was replaced with fresh media containing 0.5 mM sodium arsenite
we characterized arsenite stress-induced ubiquitination at 60 min
proteasome inhibition (0.5 μM bortezomib)

In recovery experiments, the cells were returned to the 37°C incubator for the indicated time.
quantify changes in ubiquitination in response to a 60-min heat stress and following 2 hours of recovery.

replicate_hints: excluding proteins detected in only one of three replicates for experiments performed in triplicate
multiplex_channel_hints: differentially labeled with 11-plex Tandem Mass Tag (TMT) reagents
